element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Unlimited ammo, basic attack tool throughout game
Wider area coverage; lost if hit before firing
Traversal aid for reaching higher platforms and crossing gaps
Weapon/combat aid; requires letter collectibles scattered across levels
Copy powers from defeated bosses; require weapon energy, must be replenished in their respective stages
Refill life meter; dropped by defeated enemies
Fully refills health and all item power
Eight Robot Masters: Star Man, Gravity Man, Gyro Man, Stone Man, Crystal Man, Charge Man, Napalm Man, Wave Man
New robot type designed to destroy Mega Man; encountered before final confrontation
Final challenge before true Proto Man reveals himself
Reveals himself as true antagonist after Proto Man framing

typical_tension_triggers: Charge shot accumulation mechanic (loss on hit)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Classic Mega Man action-platformer rhythm: alternating between exploration/platforming and combat encounters; tension escalates through stage progression with enemy density increasing; boss battles serve as climactic tension peaks; charge shot mechanic adds risk-reward timing tension

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Letter collectibles hidden throughout levels for Beat weapon unlock; requires exploration beyond critical path
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Letters scattered across stages as optional pickups; Beat acquisition incentivizes thorough level exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of standard platforming mechanics with basic enemies; Charge Shot mechanics established; early Robot Masters provide moderate difficulty spike
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Robot Master variety increases challenge; weapon switching becomes essential for boss weaknesses; level design complexity increases with platform precision requirements
difficulty_curve.late_game: Proto Man's fortress introduces four Dark Men as new enemy type; increased enemy density and hazard concentration; final Wily confrontation escalates challenge significantly
notable_spikes: Proto Man's fortress Dark Men sequence
Final Dr. Wily confrontation with phase changes
Fortress sections requiring accumulated Master Weapons for progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Eight distinct thematic stages, each ending with a unique Robot Master boss. Stages introduce environmental hazards matching boss themes (Stone Man's rocky platforms, Wave Man's water mechanics). Defeated bosses grant copying of their signature weapon for use elsewhere.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stone Man stage (metal platform design), Wave Man stage (water/wave mechanics)

notable_level_patterns.description: Proto Man's fortress followed by Wily's hideout serve as final gauntlets. Fortress encounters new Dark Man enemy type (four encounters); Wily's hideout requires strategic Master Weapon usage for progression.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Proto Man Castle 4 (featuring unused platform graphics), Wily Castle 2-3

notable_level_patterns.description: Eight letters hidden across stages serve as optional collectibles. Full collection unlocks Beat weapon, incentivizing thorough exploration and creating secondary difficulty challenge through exploration-based gameplay.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All eight Robot Master stages contain letter pickups

notable_level_patterns.description: Mega Buster charge shot deals increased damage with wider area coverage but is lost if Mega Man takes damage before firing. Creates timing tension in combat scenarios.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages where enemies interrupt charging
